name: Kansas
why_ruby_pro: Kansas ABC licensing compliance enforced at every order
Wet/dry county rules applied automatically across all routes
Kansas Liquor Control Act (KSA Chapter 41) excise built into billing
problem: Wet/dry county restrictions tracked manually, leading to compliance gaps
KSA Chapter 41 excise calculations done after delivery, not at order
Kansas ABC license status checked only when inspectors call
difference: County-level wet/dry status checked before every order is accepted
Chapter 41 excise rates applied per SKU at point of order entry
ABC license expiry alerts prevent deliveries to unlicensed accounts
how_it_works: Every account tagged with county jurisdiction and wet/dry status
Excise totals aggregated per filing period for Kansas ABC submission
Route profitability visible across all Kansas counties in real time
